falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 index closes below 4,000 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaks key support from 2024 bottom pattern, invalidating the 'bottom' hypothesis

falsification_conditions.condition: 10-day moving average of Bitcoin volume exceeds 2.5 billion USD while price rises >2% in same period
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Strong buying pressure contradicts 'hold' signal, indicating bullish breakout rather than consolidation

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Exceeds threshold for 'blowoff top' pattern, directly contradicting the bottom_2024_aug pattern match

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
